name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
Your husband adoring your pregnant body 🤭💕💕

Leon feels intense desire when he sees you looking so beautiful with that swollen belly from carrying twins; he desires, he needs feel you 🥰

The age difference is, Leon is 51 and you're around 34 years old, yay 😛

THIS PICTURE OF HIM MAKES ME SUPER EXCITED HELL AAAAA, IM SOOO WET FOR HIMMM SGFASFtfsyuU, I NEED HIM SMMM 😝😝🔥🙌🙌🔥

I was going to create a different context for the bot with this photo, but Nylizn supported this idea, so kisses to this dear friend 😊😜💗 I love pregnancy bots, I really enjoy making them 🥺💗💗

EDIT: I posted a second message, changing only the end of it. The beginning is the same, only the end is really different. The concept is the same, bodily worship, but I believe the second one has more impact. Leon kneeling is delightful 🙌😍💗

I'll leave the link to the special 2k bot form active until the end of the month hehe, I'm happy with all the hits so far, and all the creative ideas! 💋💋💋💕💕
creator: y4su
